overall.description: A third-person view from a medieval video game showing a peasant character repeatedly digging with a shovel in a muddy castle courtyard. Stone fortifications and towers rise in the background with smoke drifting into the sky, while wooden structures line the left side of the frame.

agents.ego_description: repeatedly digging with a shovel and depositing dirt into a wicker basket in a continuous work animation

notable_agents.action: sitting near the wooden hut, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall stone fortification with conical-roofed towers forming the castle boundary
simple wooden structure with thatched or shingled roof
dark smoke rising into the sky suggesting a distant fire or burning debris
large woven basket used for collecting excavated dirt
long-handled wooden shovel held by the digging character
wooden beams and debris scattered on the muddy ground
wooden wheelbarrow or cart positioned behind the digging area

segments.scene_description: A medieval peasant performs repetitive digging labor in a muddy castle courtyard, scooping dirt with a shovel and depositing it into a wicker basket. Stone walls and towers dominate the background with smoke rising in the distance, while a wooden hut stands to the left and another figure rests nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, focused view of grueling manual labor within the confines of a medieval castle courtyard. It begins with a peasant engaged in the repetitive motion of scooping heavy mud with a shovel and depositing it into a wicker basket. As the worker continues his task, the camera maintains its position to emphasize the surrounding environment, where a wooden hut stands to the left and another figure rests nearby. The scene remains anchored in this muddy workspace, framed by towering stone walls and fortifications that dominate the background while plumes of smoke drift slowly into the sky.
